title: Hunger Attribute
description: Adds a customizable hunger rate attribute to fine-tune food exhaustion mechanics.
body:
Hunger Attribute is a lightweight and customizable Minecraft mod that allows players and modpack creators to control how quickly hunger depletes.

Features:

- Adds a new hunger_multiplier attribute to all players.
- Allows you to increase or decrease the rate at which hunger depletes.
- Supports values from 0.01x (almost no hunger loss) to 100x (very fast hunger loss).
- Fully compatible with attribute-modifying items or effects.

How It Works:
The mod modifies internal hunger exhaustion logic using Mixins and Forge attribute APIs. The attribute is automatically applied to all players and can be modified via commands, datapacks, or other mods.
